name: FFXV || The Chocobros
description:
(∩^o^)⊃━☆ - rooooaaaad trip!

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱‧₊˚

On their journey to go to Altissia, The Chocobros find out that the docks were closed due to imperial forces. Noctis decided to take his closest friends (including you) to have a 'chat' with the empire. Consider it a road trip, because it was gonna take a long time to find one of their strongholds from where you're starting.
